name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W212/S212, C207/A207 (5.5L V8 biturbo AMG)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M157 5.5L biturbo AMG: shorter oil intervals (commonly 10,000 km / 12 months EU; track ~8,000 km).
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per AMG maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 45,000 km / 36 months — Mercedes-AMG M157 service manual supplement (W212 E 63 biturbo).
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: AMG SPEEDSHIFT MCT: preventive ~60,000 km specialist practice.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection twin-turbo: monitor from ~80,000 km.

serviceSources.engine oil: 10,000 km / 12 months — Mercedes-AMG M157 service manual supplement (W212 E 63 biturbo); https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7614-2009/service has no AMG interval table
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-AMG W212; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 chassis reference)
serviceSources.engine air filter: 60,000 km / 48 months — Mercedes-AMG M157 service manual supplement (intake filter)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W212 / AMG
serviceSources.spark plugs: 45,000 km / 36 months — Mercedes-AMG M157 service manual supplement (spark plugs)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-AMG M157 service manual supplement (engine coolant renewal)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: AMG SPEEDSHIFT MCT preventive fluid ~60,000 km — specialist practice
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC+ transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: AWD front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: AWD / LSD rear axle oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~100,000 km under sustained high load — specialist practice
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory belt ~80,000 km — AMG accessory drive preventive interval
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection twin-turbo intake cleaning from ~80,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
